meaning: adj.推定的,假定的,被公认的
examples: The overall result of this is the loss of a putative anaphase promoting complex gene.
I've created a paradox, neat as can be — and simply by using your putative p.
Like all putative natural language processing by computer, your mileage may vary.
Will its putative leader, Anwar Ibrahim, seek to better Malaysia ahead of settling scores?
Amanda Knox, putative victim of a gross miscarriage of Italian justice, I would leave on there.
